notes:
A data-loss fix for zoomed editing, plus a sidebar default tweak.

**Fixes & polish**

- **Edits made while zoomed into a heading no longer get lost.** Editing inside
  a focused heading and then zooming a level deeper could silently drop that
  section's blocks. The focused-view save now never leaves a block pointing at a
  removed parent, and the storage layer refuses to act on such a reference — so
  the rest of the note can't be cascade-deleted (PRD Addendum 20 §T3; the save
  merge + a write-boundary guard, per DATA-INTEGRITY R2).
- **The References panel opens at its narrower default again** (back to 360px;
  it had briefly defaulted to 420). You can still drag it as wide as you like —
  and your width is remembered (PRD Addendum 21 §U3/§U4.5).
